_note: update_appointment_status — verified live 2026-07-16. WHICH appointment it targets is IMPLICIT and cannot be named: in an appointment-triggered workflow it acts on the TRIGGERING appointment; in a workflow entered any other way (e.g. payment_received) GHL acts on the most recent appointment the contact is carrying. If a contact can hold several, confirm 'most recent' is the one you mean. status_type is 'confirmed' | 'cancelled'. NOTE: GHL has NO native 'rescheduled' status — detect a reschedule by triggering on the appointment event with no status filter plus an if_else on {conditionType:'appointment', conditionSubType:'appointmentRescheduled', conditionOperator:'is', conditionValue:'true'}.
name: Confirm Appointment
